---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the EU5MinerMCP server or tool surface
title: "[Feature]: "
---

## Summary

Describe the feature you want.

## Problem or use case

Explain the workflow this would improve.

## Proposed shape

Describe the API, command, or MCP tool behavior you expect.

## Notes

Mention whether the change belongs in this MCP repo or in the core `eu5miner` library.
